text.title: Six Core Principles (PMBOK 7) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: All six principles score green with no observable evidence.
antipattern.fix: Require evidence link per principle; reject score without it.

antipattern.symptom: 'Focus on Value' interpreted as 'ship more outputs'.
'Lead Accountably' shows shared accountability across 3+ leaders.
antipattern.fix: Pick one accountable; others are consulted.
